pluses: Unheard and unseen — the Little Folk slip past notice like shadows
The uncommon good-luck of the Shire
Nimble — swift and quiet even while creeping
Resilient of heart — evil struggles to grip the Little Folk; curses and poisons wear off swiftly (the Ring itself found them hard to master)
Well-fed — while their belly is full, the Little Folk mend quietly (they thrive on good food and plain plenty)
minuses: Little folk — a smaller store of body (−1 heart)
No warrior's arm in open battle
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
